SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANDELMAN, GUY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZYSMAN, MAYA $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,900.00, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT'S RETENTION OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS IN BAD FAITH AND THE AWARD INCLUDES STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,440.00 (CC 1950.5 (L) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-04-14 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Continued To Dec-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 10:40 a.m. This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo as assigned by the Presiding Judge Dept. 206.

APPEARANCES:
Dan Berko, Esq. special appearance for and with Plaintiff/Respondent Guy Handelman.
Defendant/Appellant, Maya Zysman appears in Propria Persona.

Parties are sworn and direct testify on their own behalf.
The Court hears argument and receives evidence in support.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Newly evidence are retained by the Court and previously received exhibits from the Small Claims remains with the file.

Dept. 306. Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-28-2014 Judgment Entered
